creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
* This is sada from Nagoya.

This is asami from Santa Clara (originally from Nagoya :).

 * Certainly, please do it.

Ok, done.

 * Hm, if netscape46-* are treated as just upgrade of netscape45-*,
 * who should be a maintainer of them ?

n45-n says "ports@freebsd.org" so go ahead and claim that one.  n45-c
is maintained by thepish so wait for his response for a while before
changing the maintainer line (and possibly deleting n45-c).

Satoshi
